2178960.name: Beat The Odds
2178960.description:
Beat the Odds is a relaxing game in which you take your chances against RNG.

RNG

Roll to try and match the current number. If you do, the number increases. See how far you can get before you run out of rolls.

UPGRADE, UPGRADE, UPGRADE

Earn upgrades as you level up. Choose between more rolls or spend your remaining rolls to earn upgrades to help you get further.

PROVE YOUR WORTH

Prove your worth and compete for a top spot on the leaderboards!
2178960.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
